title: A Father-in-Law with a Heart of Gold
writer: Nikos Economopoulos, Marios Nousias, Dimitris Psathas
actors: Dinos Iliopoulos, Vasilis Diamantopoulos, Anna Kyriakou
plot: After a chance encounter with a charming Athenian belle, a young solicitor decides to marry the woman of his dreams. However, there is one little problem: the bride-to-be's stern father. But, what if he, too, had a skeleton in the...
